steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
At an intersection point, the two expressions for $y$ are equal.

$$x^2+16x+8=x+8$$

steps.title: Solve for possible inputs
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor.

$$x^2+15x=0$$

$$x(x+15)=0$$

$$x=0\quad\text{or}\quad x=-15$$

steps.title: Use the listed value
steps.content: Graphing the two equations shows the same possible input values. Of the listed choices, $-15$ is present. The answer is A.
